summary: Validated Cycle Count feature end-to-end at the API layer. Created /app/backend/tests/test_cycle_count_flow.py — 15/15 tests passing. Covered: 3rd client_type 'cycle_count', auto-inclusion of cycle-count audit_sessions for cc clients (and exclusion for store/warehouse), project + auto session creation, day-wise variance with pre_pick_qty/post_pick_qty, locked-only consolidated semantics, latest-locked-day-wins per (bin,barcode), pending-locations + empty-bins consolidated endpoints, and that existing store/warehouse session flow still works. Frontend portal cascading-dropdown UX could not be browser-verified end-to-end this run (admin Sign In click did not advance past landing page in the harness — likely a selector/timing issue, not a product bug; backend behaviour the UI relies on has been verified). Recommend main agent self-test the cascading dropdown + column rendering once.
action_items: Main agent: visually verify Reports cascading dropdowns (Client → Project → Day) and Pre-Audit/Post-Audit fuchsia columns render correctly in BinWise/Detailed/BarcodeWise/CategorySummary tables for cycle_count clients.

Main agent: verify in UI that Cycle Count clients are filtered out from PortalSessions 'New Session' dialog client dropdown and that the cycle-count session row shows fuchsia Cycle Count badge + Manage link.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ClientCreate model accepts any string for client_type (no Pydantic Literal/enum). Consider validator to restrict to {'warehouse','store','cycle_count'}.

/api/audit/portal/cycle-count/projects/{pid}/report/{type} re-computes _compute_day_variance for every locked day on every consolidated request — fine for small projects, but N-day projects with deep histories will pay N× DB roundtrips per call. Consider caching per-day computed report on day close.
consolidated 'pending-locations' endpoint correctly excludes scanned-in-any-locked-day bins, but it also pulls ALL stock rows per pending bin which can be heavy — acceptable for now.

success_rate.frontend: not verified via browser harness this run

test_credentials: admin / admin123 at /portal (not /portal/login — that route shows the scanner 'Mobile App Only' page on desktop UA; admin portal is at /portal)
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures auto-create TEST_CC_<ts> cycle_count client + TEST_ST_<ts> store client and tear them down via DELETE /api/audit/portal/clients/{id} at session end. They also create a cycle project + 2 days + stock + picks + simulated synced_locations docs which are all cascaded by client delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend cycle-count flow is fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_cycle_count_flow.py. Run with: pytest backend/tests/test_cycle_count_flow.py -v. The admin portal home is at https://audio-tracker-8.preview.emergentagent.com/portal (NOT /portal/login). Login form has placeholder-based selectors: input[placeholder*='username' i], input[placeholder*='password' i], button:has-text('Sign In'). After login, a successful redirect should land on /portal/dashboard. If frontend UI tests fail, double-check whether SignIn click uses the correct submit handler — earlier sessions in this harness occasionally needed an explicit form submit / wait_for_url.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. Latest-locked-day-wins logic verified by sequence: lock day1 → consolidated reflects day1 scan qty 8 → upload+scan day2 with same bin/barcode at qty 9 → consolidated unchanged while day2 open → lock day2 → consolidated now reflects qty 9. Open days are correctly excluded from consolidated.
